title: Check 4: Item Description Match — Result
description: Output of Check 4. Verifies PR items/services accurately reflect quote/contract: description semantic match, manufacturer match, line count alignment, scope coverage (services). Ref: doc §Check 4.

check_4_status.description: Overall result. WARNING = description or manufacturer mismatch - verify items (4.1, 4.3).

description_semantic_match.description: 4.1: PR line descriptions semantically match quote/contract lines (>= 80%).

manufacturer_match.description: 4.3: Manufacturer matches when specified on both PR and quote, or not specified.

line_count_alignment.description: 4.4: PR lines <= Quote lines; all PR lines have a match.

scope_coverage_services.description: 4.6: For services, PR scope within SOW scope; N/A if no SOW.

sub_checks.description: 4.1 Description Semantic Match, 4.3 Manufacturer Match, 4.4 Line Count Alignment, 4.6 Scope Coverage (Services).

example.summary_description: PR line descriptions match quote; line count aligned; manufacturer match.

sub_checks.name: 4.4 Line Count Alignment (PR <= Quote, all matched)
4.6 Scope Coverage - Services (PR within SOW scope)

field_level_assessment.detail: Semantic match: Lenovo ThinkPad P16 vs quote line 1
Lenovo on both PR and quote

evidence.pr_value: Quote Line 1: Lenovo ThinkPad P16 Mobile Workstation
Quote Line 2: Lenovo Universal Thunderbolt 4 Dock

example.policy_reference: Data Quality Standards v2.0; Check 4 Item Description Match §4.1–4.6
